selector_catalog.observed_on: HPSCIL repository snapshot; live Qt title reports PLUS V1.4.1

notes: Copy this file to config/plus_v142_ui_profile.json. The runtime creates a local calibration report with control titles, AutomationId values and a window screenshot.
For every actual action provide target.uia first. target.image is a local PNG fallback relative to this profile; it is matched only after the UI Automation selector fails.

Supported actions: click, set_text, select, menu, hotkey, wait and capture. Values may reference ${scenario}, ${workspace}, ${expected_output}, ${historical_lulc_0}, ${driver_dem}, ${plus_random_seed} and RE fields such as ${re_core_driver_input}.

Set calibrated to true only after checking the profile against the local HPSCIL PLUS snapshot window. Its repository file name is V1.4.2 while the observed window title is V1.4.1; the profile must use the observed controls, not infer a version from either label. Use unique step ids so an interrupted run can attach to the existing GUI and continue safely.
